data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Revenue tracking and forecasting', but the evidence provided does not include sufficient details on how revenue is tracked over time or forecasted. While there is a total revenue figure of $18,450 mentioned, there is no breakdown or historical data to support ongoing tracking or forecasting capabilities. This indicates a clear gap in meeting the requirement as specified in the linked use case needs.
gaps: Lack of detailed revenue tracking over time and forecasting mechanisms.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
